doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated March 2026 (future date), and its core legal claim that pseudonymized data falls outside GDPR scope for processors without re-identification keys contradicts established EDPB doctrine on pseudonymization under recital
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated March 2026 (a future date from the perspective of most current contexts), claims to supersede real EDPB guidance, and makes legally dubious assertions (that pseudonymized data falls wholly outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders) that contradict established EDPB positions on pseudonymization and recital 26.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated March 2026 (future date), and its core legal claim that pseudonymized data falls outside GDPR scope for processors without re-identification keys contradicts established EDPB doctrine on pseudonymization under recital 26.
